children.heading: .—Superior Accomplishments and Performance Awards Program
children.label: a .—Superior Accomplishments and Performance Awards Program
children.text: The Secretary may establish an awards program for personnel listed in consistent with chapter 45 of title 5, to the extent practicable.section 7421(b) of this title

personnel appointed under for a position that the Secretary has determined is of equivalent rank to a Senior Executive Service position (as such term is defined in ) and is subject to an agency performance management system; andsection 7401(1) of this titlesection 3132(a) of title 5
personnel appointed under section 7306 or 7401(4) of this title.

children.heading: .—Payment of Awards
children.label: c .—Payment of Awards
children.text: Awards under this section may be paid based on criteria established by the Secretary and shall not be considered in calculating the limitation under .section 7431(e)(4) of this title

children.heading: .—Not Considered Basic Pay
children.label: d .—Not Considered Basic Pay
children.text: Awards under this section shall not be considered basic pay for any purpose.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: e .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary may prescribe regulations for the administration of this section.
